updateNote: Day 78 PM: Iran announces Persian Gulf Strait Authority (PGSA) — formal Hormuz toll mechanism, excludes US 'Project Freedom' ships. Trump sends written nuclear proposal; Araghchi denies receiving it. Shamkhani: ready to sign if all sanctions removed, but US demands 'a fantasy.' IDF Capt. Maoz Recanati (24, Golani) killed by Hezbollah unjammable fiber-optic FPV drone in S. Lebanon — 7th IDF death since ceasefire; 6 wounded. Iran restores 30/33 Hormuz missile sites per ISW. Houthis threaten Bab al-Mandab closure (dual-closure scenario). USS Gerald R. Ford returns Norfolk (record 11-month deployment). Israel: 50 KIA / 8,615 injured. Lebanon: 2,969 killed / 9,112 wounded. Brent $109.26, WTI $105.42. Gas $4.52/gal. Hormuz Day 76.
dataFreshnessWarning: Last updated 12:40 PM PDT on May 16, 2026
